title: Baseline guard
scope: 执行前确认当前服务/测试/工作区状态
acceptance_criteria: 记录 git status 摘要；Web 测试通过；API health 正常；确认 Go 测试运行方式
evidence: git status checked；npm web test 222 passed；Docker go test ./... passed；healthz ok；compose services up

title: Web asset list API client
scope: 让 Web client 可调用服务端 campaign asset list
acceptance_criteria: 新增 list assets helper；类型覆盖 asset_id/task_id/status/provider/model/prompt/delivery/created_at；鉴权透传一致
verification: 前端单测覆盖 URL 构造、状态归一化、鉴权 header
evidence: added buildAgentImageflowAssetsUrl and listAgentImageflowAssets；asset type now includes scope task metadata delivery created_at；vitest passed

title: Server asset sync in Web
scope: 当前 scope 下同步 MCP/REST/CLI/Web 创建的服务端资产
acceptance_criteria: 通过 MCP 创建的资产，在 Web 点击同步或刷新后可出现；刷新页面后仍能重新拉取；不依赖浏览器本地任务历史
verification: MCP 创建 mock 图片；Web 同步；检查图卡可打开 original/thumbnail/metadata
evidence: MCP task task_8df69831d9ae5c4aa92a produced asset_01cc40da9ee74c9f5368；browser reload still showed asset from server list

title: Minimal asset library view
scope: 提供最小资产库管理视图
verification: Web 测试关键状态；浏览器手测 Web/MCP 两类资产
evidence: ServerAssetLibrary shows thumbnail prompt provider model status source task asset created target and Original Metadata ID URL actions

title: Scope dashboard console
scope: 把已有 workspace/project/campaign 做成可发现控制台
acceptance_criteria: 用户能看到所有空间、项目、活动；能看到资产数量、selected/rejected 数量、最近活动；能切换当前 scope
verification: 用已创建的萌宠 project 和嵌入式 project 验证可发现、可切换
evidence: ScopeManager shows workspace project campaign stats；P0 smoke scope showed 1 project 1 campaign 1 asset 1 selected；partial protected scopes are skipped with warning

title: Source session metadata standard
scope: 统一 source/session/batch metadata 的保留和展示
acceptance_criteria: Web 创建任务写入 source=web；MCP/REST 传入 metadata_json 可在 asset metadata 中保留；资产库可显示 source/session/batch
verification: REST/MCP 创建带 metadata_json 的任务并查询 asset metadata
evidence: AssetResponse exposes metadata_json extracted from structured_input_json；MCP metadata source session batch story scene target visible in Web asset library

title: Cross-entry regression review
scope: 整体回归检查 Web/MCP/REST/CLI 是否共用同一事实源
acceptance_criteria: Web 创建资产可在资产库看到；MCP 创建资产可在资产库看到；REST list assets 返回一致；select/reject 状态一致
verification: npm test；Docker Go test；curl smoke；MCP smoke
evidence: Web reject/select updated asset then REST list returned final approved status；npm test passed；npm build passed；Docker go test passed；MCP and curl smoke passed
